subject: 515 weekly report - week ending - 04/03/2026
body:
Hello, please see below my 515.

Accomplishments:
- Continued work on the agentic AI productivity tool using Codex. I learned that Codex is very effective for pair programming and for exploring integrations with software I’m less familiar with.
- Monitored speech-to-text issues. Snehit’s prompt tuning appears to have resolved most cases, so no further action was needed on my end.
- Continued MVP discussions and met with designers about DegreeMe’s new design to surface more degrees. It was a good reminder that designers provide irreplaceable value beyond what AI delivers.

Priorities for next week:
- Continue development of the POC for the agentic AI productivity tool (using Codex).
- Assist the team with job interviews for prospective applicants.
- Follow up on any DegreeMe design action items as needed.

Challenges:
No major blockers this week.

Lessons learned / opportunities:
Codex is particularly useful for pair coding and rapidly exploring integrations, which speeds prototyping. Keep leveraging human designers for UI and product decisions.

Thanks!
Andrea
